kinds.name: mock
kinds.title: Mock data
kinds.description: Stand-in data shown until the real source is wired.

kinds.name: stub
kinds.title: Stub
kinds.description: Placeholder behaviour that is not real logic yet.

kinds.name: unenforced
kinds.title: Unenforced
kinds.description: A rule declared before it is enforced in code.

kinds.name: todo
kinds.title: Todo
kinds.description: Planned work that is not built yet.

kinds.name: hack
kinds.title: Hack
kinds.description: A shortcut that works but should be revisited.

kinds.name: fixme
kinds.title: Fixme
kinds.description: A known defect that needs a real fix.
